M1740_BD_NONE M1740 (M0610) Cog/Behavr/Psych Symp- None of The Above This field indicates no cognitive, behavioral, or psychiatric symptoms have been demonstrated. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
